name: Product Defects
description: Assertion failures indicating a real product bug

name: Element Not Found
description: Page elements could not be located (possible UI change or flaky locator)

name: Test Defects
description: Errors in test code itself (NPE, class cast, etc.)

name: Navigation / Network Issues
description: Page load failures, DNS or connection errors

name: Timeout Errors
description: Operations that exceeded the configured timeout

name: Skipped / Disabled
description: Tests that were intentionally skipped or disabled
